✦ About Me

Design With
Intention & Soul

Hi, I'm Toby — a creative who works at the intersection of UI/UX design, game design, and visual effects art.

I believe the best design feels like a waking dream — intuitive yet unexpected, functional yet beautiful. My UX-driven approach ensures every interface serves its users, while my VFX background adds layers of visual storytelling that turn interactions into moments.

Whether it's crafting seamless user flows, designing gameplay systems, or building particle simulations — I bring a holistic vision that bridges art and logic.

✦ What I Do

Core Expertise

◎

UI / UX Design

User research, wireframing, prototyping, and building interfaces that feel natural. Translating complex systems into seamless, delightful journeys.

◆

Game Design

Concept development, mechanics design, level design, and systems balancing. Crafting gameplay loops that keep players in flow.

UnityGame ProgrammingLevel DesignSystems DesignPlaytestingGDDNarrative

VFX Art
